package rulefixtures

import (
	"path/filepath"
	"strings"
)

// scenario for filepath_join_with_user_path: `filepath.Join(baseDir, userInput)` without subsequent `filepath.Rel` or path-containment validation
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario710Negative(base string, userInput string) (string, bool) {
	joined := filepath.Join(base, userInput)
	rel, err := filepath.Rel(base, joined)
	return joined, err == nil && !strings.HasPrefix(rel, "..")
}
